column7: Very cool extension of the black meteor holds climb. I found the first two moves very fun, so I wanted to turn it into a real climb. Figuring out how to make the last move was pretty tricky, but I really like how it turned out. Once you send it you will understand the reason behind the name.

The dynamic first two moves quickly lead into a more controlled next two, up until the swing at the end. The controlled crimps will be hard to get used to, but mastering the footwork feels super cool. The name comes from the style of the climb. The first two moves are dynamic, showing how you just sent your first V4 and feel pretty good. Then comes the plateau in which you feel like you aren't making progress. You just have to be patient and push through untill the final move, where you swing to victory.
